# CWE-841: Improper Enforcement of Behavioral Workflow (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-841-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

var accountPasswords = map[string]string{}
var accountMFAPassed = map[string]bool{}

// Vulnerable: password reset proceeds without confirming MFA step completed.
func ResetAccount(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	email := r.FormValue("email")
	newPass := r.FormValue("new_password")
	if email == "" || newPass == "" {
		http.Error(w, "bad request", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	_ = accountMFAPassed[email]
	accountPasswords[email] = newPass
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
